name: Premium Magnetic Charging Cube
description: The absolute cleanest way to declutter your workspace. Instantly charges your phone, watch, and earbuds simultaneously without a tangled mess of wires.

name: Ultra-Slim Mechanical Keyboard
description: Perfect tactility without the deafening noise. This sleek, compact Bluetooth mechanical keyboard switches seamlessly between your laptop, tablet, and phone.

name: Smart Ambient LED Light Bar
description: Syncs beautifully with your desktop monitor to reduce eye strain and create an immersive, premium atmosphere for your late-night work or gaming sessions.
